title: incorrect RTL under assert() causes verilator to produce incorrect C++

features.name: 2D unpacked array with high-width elements
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array with 40-bit wide elements where the array has dimensions [32-1:0][2-1:0]

features.name: unpacked array indexing in bitwise assert expression
features.description: Code should include an assert() statement containing a bitwise AND operation between an indexed 2D unpacked array and a scalar mask value
